name: openproject-mcp
description: Manage OpenProject projects, work packages, users and versions through AI assistants
long_description:
Connect Claude, Cursor, or any MCP client directly to your OpenProject instance.

Manage your entire project workflow through natural language:
- **Projects** — list, create, update, delete
- **Work Packages** — create tasks/bugs/features, update status, assign users, add comments
- **Users** — list team members, view profiles
- **Versions** — manage sprints and milestones
- **Statuses, Types, Priorities** — reference data lookup

**Delete protection:** All destructive actions require explicit user confirmation before executing.

**29 tools** covering the full OpenProject REST API.

openproject_url.title: OpenProject URL
openproject_url.description: Base URL of your OpenProject instance (e.g. https://projects.example.com)

openproject_api_token.title: API Token
openproject_api_token.description: Personal API access token. Get it from My Account → Access Tokens in OpenProject.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get project details by ID or identifier

tools.name: update_project
tools.description: Update project name, description or status

tools.name: list_work_packages
tools.description: List work packages with optional filters

tools.name: get_work_package
tools.description: Get full details of a work package

tools.name: delete_work_package
tools.description: Delete a work package (requires user confirmation)

tools.name: list_work_package_activities
tools.description: Get work package comments and change history

tools.name: add_work_package_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a work package

tools.name: list_work_package_relations
tools.description: List relations for a work package

tools.name: create_work_package_relation
tools.description: Create a relation between two work packages

tools.name: list_types
tools.description: List all work package types globally

tools.name: list_project_types
tools.description: List types enabled for a project

tools.name: create_version
tools.description: Create a project version or milestone
